svg.title: Oracle Cloud Blue/Green Deployment Architecture
svg.desc: Blue/green Kubernetes deployment pipeline on Oracle Cloud using DevOps, OCIR, and OKE

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does a developer interact with Oracle Cloud DevOps?')
sendPrompt('What is OCI DevOps code repository?')
sendPrompt('What is OCI DevOps build pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How does OCI DevOps build Docker images?')
sendPrompt('What is Oracle Container Image Registry OCIR?')
sendPrompt('How does Terraform create an OKE cluster on Oracle Cloud?')
sendPrompt('What is Oracle Kubernetes Engine OKE?')
sendPrompt('How does OCI Load Balancer support blue/green deployments?')
sendPrompt('What is an OCI Dynamic Group and Instance Principal for OKE to pull from OCIR?')
sendPrompt('How do users reach OKE via OCI Load Balancer?')
